title: Persona-Based Product Description
scenario: Write a product description for a new smart home device targeting a 25-40-year-old urban professional, focusing on the device's advanced features and ease of use.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the prompt is within the 150-word limit and uses a conversational tone.
Assess if the description accurately targets the 25-40-year-old urban professional persona.
Verify that the description accurately highlights the device's advanced features and ease of use.
